nodes.label: Content Style - Path 3 (Layered)
nodes.rationale: Scan Box at top (3-5 bullets, 30-second read) covering what/why/so what; existing prose underneath untouched; diagrams and callouts woven through

nodes.label: C0 - Content Builder Agent
nodes.rationale: Edits content/source/ JSON files and rendered HTML in content/frozen/; touches sample apps; plans before building

nodes.label: Content-Quality - Read-Only Reviewer
nodes.rationale: MUST be invoked after every c0 completion to verify brand, voice, structural integrity, accessibility, and AI-tell discipline

nodes.label: Q0 - Quiz Curator Agent
nodes.rationale: Drafts question-bank additions when c0 introduces new sections or architectural concepts; read-only

nodes.label: L0 - Skill/Prompt-Library Builder
nodes.rationale: Generates reusable prompts for the team; outputs land in prompts-library/

nodes.label: graphify - Knowledge Graph
nodes.rationale: Knowledge graph at graphify-out/ with god nodes, community structure, cross-file relationships; query, path, explain tools available

nodes.label: GitHub Flow Workflow
nodes.rationale: main is always publishable; work on short-lived branches; changes reviewed through PRs; team is trusted; main is lightly protected

nodes.label: Branch Naming Strategy
nodes.rationale: Scopes: course/, quiz/, ref/, prompts/, fix/, chore/, docs/ with short-lived naming convention

nodes.label: Release Strategy - Versioned per Component (SemVer)
nodes.rationale: Separate prefixed tags: course-vMAJOR.MINOR.PATCH and quiz-vMAJOR.MINOR.PATCH; pre-1.0 append pre-release suffix

nodes.label: Bundle Contents - Five Parts
nodes.rationale: backend/ (FastAPI app), frontend/ (Static SPA), content/frozen/ (Frozen HTML), content/source/ (JSON source), prompt-library/ (not deployed)

nodes.label: v2 Migration - Folder Restructuring
nodes.rationale: quiz-certification/ → backend/, app/ → frontend/, content-architecture/ → content/source/, content-system/ (+app/resources/) → content/frozen/

nodes.label: Tier 1 - Deterministic Gates (No DB)
nodes.rationale: Backend env setup, smoke tests (15/15), backend unit tests (5 passed), frontend import graph (98/98 relative imports resolve)

nodes.label: Media Streaming Endpoints
nodes.rationale: GET /media/video/{asset_id} with Accept-Ranges: bytes for scrubbing; GET /media/image/{asset_id} with correct Content-Type

nodes.label: Monorepo Layout
nodes.rationale: content/ (frozen/, source/), frontend/, backend/, prompt-library/; independent deployments; separate versioning

nodes.label: graphify Rules Agent
nodes.rationale: Consult knowledge graph at graphify-out/ for codebase questions; query, path, explain tools; update graph after code changes

nodes.label: C0 Voice Rules - Declarative Opinionated
nodes.rationale: Lead with decision or fact; reasons follow; present tense for architectural truths; sparse second person; concrete examples; numbers when available

nodes.label: C0 - AI-Tell Forbidden List
nodes.rationale: Avoid: delve, tapestry, landscape, in the world of, navigating, it's important to note, crucially, essentially, whether you're, not just X but Y, game-changer, let's explore, excessive em-dashes

nodes.label: L0 Skill Output Structure
nodes.rationale: Markdown files with front matter (id, name, version, cluster, role-affinity); Purpose, When to use, When NOT to use, Inputs, Output format, System prompt, Examples, Failure modes

nodes.label: L0 Skill Clusters
nodes.rationale: diagram, code, utility, structure; role-affinity: analyst, architect, dev, qa

nodes.label: Q0 Question Shape
nodes.rationale: JSON with id, tier (beginner/advanced), category, question, options (4), correct (zero-based index), explanation

nodes.label: Q0 Question Constraints
nodes.rationale: One concept per question; plausible distractors (common misconceptions); no CSS/font questions; Indian English; declarative voice

nodes.label: Content-Quality - Ten Checks
nodes.rationale: Structural integrity, Brand (#FF4900, fonts, logo), Voice (AI-tells), Path 3 layering, Diagrams, Cross-page links, Dark mode, Accessibility, Indian audience, Course-specific

nodes.label: graphify Audit Trail - EXTRACTED/INFERRED/AMBIGUOUS
nodes.rationale: EXTRACTED: explicit in source; INFERRED: reasonable inference; AMBIGUOUS: uncertain; confidence_score required on every edge

nodes.label: Backend Quiz Features
nodes.rationale: Dynamic quiz generation (random sampling, shuffled options), two difficulty levels (beginner/advanced), Google SSO (domain-restricted), server-side validation, certificate on pass (PDF), JSON storage, 7-day cool-down, CLI review

nodes.label: Backend Anti-Cheat Model
nodes.rationale: Correct answers never leave server; per-quiz option shuffle; server-side grading; quiz state expires on submit; ownership check; time-bounded (20-minute timer); cool-down on fail

nodes.label: Backend Migrations - Phase 2a Status
nodes.rationale: Alembic initialized, env.py wired, 6 revisions (baseline, reconcile, new_tables, new_columns, seed_data, lo_cleanup); legacy reference.sql frozen; Phase 2b/2c deferred

nodes.label: Backend Cert Backward-Compatibility - Phase 2a Critical
nodes.rationale: 0005_seed_data inserts legacy-prod signing key; CERT_HMAC_LEGACY env var must be set before Phase 2c cutover; every cert issued before Phase 2a continues to verify
